competency_level_descriptors.extending: Suggests different response and explains why it would be better.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This criterion addresses the forward-thinking adjustment component - proposing alternative responses for future similar situations.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can identify a pattern in how I tend to respond in a type of situation.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot identify response patterns
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally identifies response patterns with prompting
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes identifies response patterns without prompting
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently identifies response patterns without prompting
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Consistently identifies patterns and can articulate the identification process

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Two criteria are needed because identifying patterns and explaining reasons are distinct cognitive operations requiring different assessment approaches.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can give a reason for why a response pattern might happen.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Cannot explain pattern reasons
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally explains pattern reasons with prompting
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes explains pattern reasons without prompting
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently explains pattern reasons without prompting
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Consistently explains reasons and can model reasoning for others

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Two criteria are needed because identifying patterns and explaining reasons are distinct cognitive operations requiring different assessment approaches.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can analyse a pattern that I observe across more than one situation in my thinking or behaviour.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No pattern analysis attempted across situations.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Identifies similarities between situations with prompting but limited analysis.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes patterns across situations but analysis lacks depth or clarity.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly analyses patterns across multiple situations, identifying key commonalities and differences in thinking or behaviour.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Analyses patterns thoroughly and can explain the analysis process used.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This represents the first distinct cognitive operation of analysing patterns across multiple contexts.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can explain what drives the pattern I have identified in my thinking or behaviour.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No explanation of pattern drivers provided.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts to explain drivers with prompting but explanations are unclear.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Provides basic explanations of what drives patterns but may lack insight.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly explains the underlying causes, triggers, or motivations that drive the identified pattern.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Explains pattern drivers with sophisticated insight and can consider multiple influences.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This represents the second distinct cognitive operation of explaining causal relationships behind observed patterns.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can describe a specific adjustment I have made or will make to address the pattern.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No specific adjustments described.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Mentions adjustments with prompting but descriptions lack specificity or clarity.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes adjustments but they may be vague or not clearly connected to the pattern.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Describes specific, concrete adjustments that clearly address the identified pattern and its drivers.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Describes specific adjustments and can explain the reasoning behind the adjustment strategy.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This represents the third distinct cognitive operation of formulating specific action plans based on pattern analysis.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can evaluate a pattern in my thinking or responses across different contexts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No pattern evaluation demonstrated
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Evaluates patterns with significant prompting and guidance
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Evaluates patterns sometimes across limited contexts
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently evaluates patterns in thinking or responses across multiple different contexts
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Evaluates patterns comprehensively and explains evaluation approach

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Three distinct cognitive operations (evaluate, justify, describe effects) each require separate assessment as they represent different reasoning capabilities.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can justify what sustains a pattern in my thinking or responses.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No justification for sustaining factors
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts justification with prompting but reasoning unclear
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Provides basic justification for some sustaining factors
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly justifies what sustains patterns with sound reasoning and evidence
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Justifies sustaining factors with sophisticated reasoning

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Three distinct cognitive operations (evaluate, justify, describe effects) each require separate assessment as they represent different reasoning capabilities.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can describe the effect of a specific adjustment I have made.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No description of adjustment effects
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Attempts to describe effects with significant prompting
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Describes some effects of adjustments with basic detail
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Clearly describes specific effects of adjustments made with concrete examples
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Describes effects comprehensively with reflection on impact

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Three distinct cognitive operations (evaluate, justify, describe effects) each require separate assessment as they represent different reasoning capabilities.

criteria.criterion_statement: The student demonstrates adaptive self-direction by independently adjusting approaches when initial attempts don't work, naming setbacks without dismissing them, and accepting suggestions for alternative strategies without extended resistance.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No self-directed adjustments observed when approaches fail.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally adjusts approach or names setbacks with adult prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes independently tries different approaches and acknowledges setbacks.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently stops and tries different approaches independently, names what happened after setbacks, and accepts suggestions without resistance.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Consistently demonstrates adaptive responses and can explain why changing approaches helps.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This dispositional learning target represents a unified metacognitive orientation observable through three interconnected behaviours that together demonstrate self-directed learning capacity at this developmental level.

criteria.criterion_statement: The student demonstrates sustained metacognitive self-direction through strategic recall, self-reflection, and inquiry-based problem solving without adult prompting.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No metacognitive behaviors observed without prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally refers to past strategies or reflects when prompted by adults.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes demonstrates strategic recall, reflection, or inquiry without prompting in familiar contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently refers to helpful strategies, volunteers specific work observations, and asks inquiry questions without prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Consistently demonstrates metacognitive habits and can explain their self-direction approach to others.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This dispositional learning target represents a unified orientation toward metacognitive self-direction that manifests through three observable behaviors that work together as indicators of the same underlying disposition.

criteria.criterion_statement: The student demonstrates sustained metacognitive self-direction by identifying personal response patterns, making mid-task adjustments, and connecting current responses to previously identified patterns.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: No metacognitive self-direction behaviours observed
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally identifies patterns or adjusts approach with adult prompting
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes identifies response patterns and makes adjustments without prompting
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently identifies personal response patterns across situations, adjusts approach mid-task, and connects responses to identified patterns
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Demonstrates sustained metacognitive self-direction and articulates strategies

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This is a Type 3 dispositional learning target requiring exactly one criterion that captures the observable metacognitive self-direction behaviours at this band level.

criteria.criterion_statement: The student demonstrates sustained metacognitive self-direction by articulating specific adjustments to their thinking or behaviour, applying self-awareness strategies unprompted in novel situations, and making connections between wellbeing learning and behaviour across contexts.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: Self-direction behaviours not yet observed.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: Occasionally articulates adjustments or applies strategies with some prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: Sometimes demonstrates unprompted self-awareness and makes cross-domain connections.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: Consistently articulates specific adjustments across domains, applies self-awareness strategies unprompted in novel situations, and connects wellbeing learning to other contexts.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: Consistently demonstrates sustained metacognitive self-direction and can articulate or model these processes for others.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: This dispositional learning target represents a unified metacognitive orientation that manifests through interconnected behaviours of self-adjustment, strategy application, and cross-contextual connection-making that cannot be meaningfully separated.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can design the conditions for sustained attention in a piece of my own work — including managing digital distractions — and produce a written evaluation of how different attentional strategies interacted with different types of tasks.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can design the conditions for sustained attention in a piece of my own work — including managing digital distractions — and produce a written evaluation of how different attentional strategies interacted with different types of tasks.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated capability: designing attentional conditions and evaluating strategy-task interactions.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can audit my attentional patterns across a sustained period of high-stakes work, produce a written analysis identifying the conditions and strategies that most reliably support my best work, and propose specific adjustments to my workflow.
criteria.criterion_label: Longitudinal attention audit and workflow adjustment

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can audit my attentional patterns across a sustained period of high-stakes work, produce a written analysis identifying the conditions and strategies that most reliably support my best work, and propose specific adjustments to my workflow.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated self-directed metacognitive audit capability.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can write a decision analysis that identifies at least one cognitive bias or assumption likely to be affecting my reasoning, describes an adjustment I made to my process to reduce its impact, and evaluates the quality of the reasoning independent of the outcome.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can write a decision analysis that identifies at least one cognitive bias or assumption likely to be affecting my reasoning, describes an adjustment I made to my process to reduce its impact, and evaluates the quality of the reasoning independent of the outcome.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated meta-reasoning capability combining bias identification, process adjustment, and quality evaluation.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can construct a reasoned written position on a complex, contested, and high-stakes decision: weighing multiple types of evidence, acknowledging irreducible uncertainty, making the logic of my choice explicit, and naming what would cause me to revise.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can construct a reasoned written position on a complex, contested, and high-stakes decision: weighing multiple types of evidence, acknowledging irreducible uncertainty, making the logic of my choice explicit, and naming what would cause me to revise.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated wisdom-under-uncertainty capability.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can write an analysis identifying the structural and social factors affecting my access to healthy habits, evaluate health claims in two sources using evidence-quality criteria, and produce a redesigned habits plan that accounts for conditions I cannot individually control.
criteria.criterion_label: Structural health determinants analysis and redesign

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can write an analysis identifying the structural and social factors affecting my access to healthy habits, evaluate health claims in two sources using evidence-quality criteria, and produce a redesigned habits plan that accounts for conditions I cannot individually control.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated capability combining structural analysis, evidence evaluation, and habits redesign.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can produce a designed health maintenance approach sustainable across the demands of adult life, accounting for competing priorities, social pressures, and systems-level constraints, and articulate in writing why sustainable habits require external conditions, not only personal willpower.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can produce a designed health maintenance approach sustainable across the demands of adult life, accounting for competing priorities, social pressures, and systems-level constraints, and articulate in writing why sustainable habits require external conditions, not only personal willpower.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated critical-health-literacy capability oriented toward adult-life sustainability.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can complete a written analysis of a coercion, grooming, or exploitation scenario (online or institutional) that applies the relevant legal framework, evaluates the institutional context, and drafts a non-directive, trauma-aware response to a friend disclosing a similar situation.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can complete a written analysis of a coercion, grooming, or exploitation scenario (online or institutional) that applies the relevant legal framework, evaluates the institutional context, and drafts a non-directive, trauma-aware response to a friend disclosing a similar situation.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated legal-literacy and trauma-aware response capability.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can facilitate a rubric-assessed 20-minute structured discussion about consent, power, and boundaries with peers or younger students that applies age-appropriate language, surfaces and corrects at least two common myths using evidence, and closes with a rights-based framing.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can facilitate a rubric-assessed 20-minute structured discussion about consent, power, and boundaries with peers or younger students that applies age-appropriate language, surfaces and corrects at least two common myths using evidence, and closes with a rights-based framing.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated educational-facilitation capability requiring mastery of all prior consent reasoning.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can complete a written analysis of a reproductive or sexual-health question that identifies the relevant healthcare service, states the access pathway and confidentiality conditions in this jurisdiction, and evaluates at least two information sources against stated evidence-based guideline criteria.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can complete a written analysis of a reproductive or sexual-health question that identifies the relevant healthcare service, states the access pathway and confidentiality conditions in this jurisdiction, and evaluates at least two information sources against stated evidence-based guideline criteria.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated health-system navigation and source-evaluation capability.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can construct a written critical evaluation of a contested SRH claim that weighs the quality of evidence on each side, identifies the ideological, cultural, or commercial interests shaping the discourse, acknowledges what remains uncertain, and articulates my reasoned personal position.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can construct a written critical evaluation of a contested SRH claim that weighs the quality of evidence on each side, identifies the ideological, cultural, or commercial interests shaping the discourse, acknowledges what remains uncertain, and articulates my reasoned personal position.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated critical-health-literacy capability applied to contested SRH discourse.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can facilitate a rubric-assessed 15-minute structured group conversation in which participants disagree on a substantive question, managing the process rather than the positions, ensuring all voices are heard, and maintaining a constructive tone across the session.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band E.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band E Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band E Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can facilitate a rubric-assessed 15-minute structured group conversation in which participants disagree on a substantive question, managing the process rather than the positions, ensuring all voices are heard, and maintaining a constructive tone across the session.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band E Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band E as the Do statement represents one integrated facilitation capability requiring all prior communication skills.

criteria.criterion_statement: I can complete a rubric-assessed communication task across significant difference (cultural, generational, or positional) in which I adjust my register and tone to the context without losing my own perspective, and demonstrate in written reflection my awareness of the power dynamics shaping who gets heard.

competency_level_descriptors.no_evidence: The student has not produced work that demonstrates any aspect of this learning target at Band F.
competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can complete a rubric-assessed communication task across significant difference (cultural, generational, or positional) in which I adjust my register and tone to the context without losing my own perspective, and demonstrate in written reflection my awareness of the power dynamics shaping who gets heard.

competency_level_descriptors.emerging: The student shows initial engagement with the Band F Do statement but requires significant support or prompting.
competency_level_descriptors.developing: The student demonstrates some but not all components of the Band F Do statement consistently.
competency_level_descriptors.competent: I can complete a rubric-assessed written analysis that (a) evaluates the cumulative effect of persuasive design across a sustained period on my attention, relationships, and identity — drawing on my own evidence (e.g. tracked use, tracked mood, observation), (b) compares my analysis against at least two recognised pieces of research on digital wellbeing, including at least one that contests a claim I find sympathetic, and (c) articulates a reasoned personal position specifying where I will and will not allow these systems to operate on me, acknowledging what the evidence supports strongly, weakly, and where it remains genuinely uncertain.
competency_level_descriptors.extending: The student demonstrates the Band F Do statement and additionally transfers the capability to an unfamiliar context, teaches or explains it to others, or demonstrates unusual depth beyond the band expectation.

criteria.decomposition_rationale: Single criterion for Band F as the Do statement represents one integrated research-anchored, values-based stance on cumulative digital influence. LT 8.2 Band F is a conceptual accelerator for LT 8.3 — no edges added pending next session.
